title: dryopteris erythrosora
intro: Dryopteris erythrosora, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris erythrosora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
